Device management solutions for your organization’s devices, apps, and data

Modernize your IT efficiently with a strategic endpoint management solution from Microsoft and Surface.

Surface device management

Secure cloud deployment
  • Secure cloud deployment
  • Firmware management
  • Surface Management portal
  • Surface Support portal
  • Beyond deployment

Boost your IT efficiency

Organizations that choose Surface with Microsoft 365 reported a 40% reduction of IT staff time spent on maintenance.1

Streamline deployment

With zero touch deployment, set up new users in minutes by automatically configuring devices with Windows 11 for Business.

Complete device management

A centralized IT solution allows your team to manage and update Surface devices across your organization, as well as apply Surface firmware and security updates.

Easy redeployment and end-of-life

Using Microsoft Intune, administrators can remotely lock, wipe, deregister, and reregister Surface devices.

Secure and fast device deployment

Pause
Previous Next

Deploy devices from the cloud

Surface devices support Windows Autopilot, reducing IT complexity with cloud-based device deployment and management.

Simplify device management

Once deployed, Microsoft Intune enables IT to remotely manage apps, configurations, and policies.

Save user’s time

Organizations saw a 27% reduction in wait times for deployment.1,2

Simplify deployment with Microsoft Intune

Organizations take advantage of automated patching and other updates through Intune Management to reduce the amount of staff time required to manage and administer employee devices on a day-to-day basis.1

Manage down to the firmware level

Pause
Previous Next

Simplify device management

Easily oversee and manage all your Surface devices at scale with Microsoft Endpoint Manager.

Manage your hardware

Enable and disable hardware components such as Bluetooth®, cameras, and USB ports.

Management in one place

Track and manage the health, warranty status, support requests, and bulk replacement of your Surface devices from one place.

Stay secure and productive with updates

Customize updates from Microsoft with Windows Update for Business on your Surface devices and boost security and innovation.

Explore the Surface Management Portal

A centralized solution for IT to self-serve, manage, and monitor Surface devices at scale in Microsoft Endpoint Manager.
Explore Surface Management Portal

  • View the status of your Surface devices

    Check up on the health of each Surface machine by monitoring compliance issues, available storage, inactivity, encryption needs, and any immediate actions required.

  • Manage warranty data

    Proactively plan for device refreshes and support by managing warranty data through the Surface Management Portal.

  • Streamline support requests

    Seamlessly track all device updates by viewing your support tickets in one centralized location.

Save time with Surface Support Portal

Get time-saving, modernized support across all of your organization’s Surface devices. Easily access AI-enabled self-help for troubleshooting, submit support and service requests, track device history, monitor warranty coverage, and much more.
Learn more

  • Simplified support

    AI-enabled, personalized self-help.

  • Comprehensive support view

    Track device history of repairs, technical support, and exchanges.

  • Centralized management

    Manage warranty and Protection Plan status of your Surface devices in a consolidated view.

Support beyond deployment

  • Trusted experts

    Our growing network of trusted Authorized Service Providers is filled with experts who repair devices using reliable Microsoft parts.

  • Device serviceability

    Skilled technicians can easily service devices by replacing components like SSDs, display assembly, keyset, and trackpad.

  • Move confidently to the cloud with FastTrack

    FastTrack helps customers deploy Microsoft cloud solutions. Customers with eligible subscriptions to Microsoft 365, Azure, or Dynamics 365 can use FastTrack at no additional cost for the life of their subscription.

Three ways to modernize device IT

Take the hard work out of hardware management with Surface and these resources.

  • Set up in minutes

    IT staff using Microsoft 365 say that Surface devices can save configuration and deployment time, giving them time to focus on other projects.1

  • Save hours of valuable IT time

    IT staff saw a 40% reduction on time spent on maintenance and there were 49% fewer helpdesk incidents.1

  • Lower security costs

    Organizations reported a 34% reduction in security incidents with Surface devices and the Microsoft 365 ecosystem.1

More solutions for your business

Elevate your organization with more security and remote management solutions from Surface.

Security

Get more secure and maintain control, from chip to cloud, with protection from Microsoft. Surface helps you mount proactive defenses with security built in.
Explore security

  • Designed for the modern workplace

    The Surface for Business portfolio delivers experiences employees love with the choice and flexibility they need to work on their terms.

    Where to buy Compare devices
  • New

    Surface Pro for Business, 13-inch | Intel

    Starting at $1,949.49

    Fast, workday-ready performance powered by the next-gen Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3), with built-in AI and optional 5G for productivity anywhere.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3)
    • AI experiences powered by a dedicated NPU
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen with optional OLED
    • Optional 5G connectivity
    • All-day battery life
    Meet Surface Pro
  • New

    Surface Laptop for Business, 13.8 and 15-inch | Intel

    Starting at $1,949.99

    Reliable Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3) performance with on-device AI, plus an integrated privacy screen on select models for added security.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3)
    • AI experiences powered by a dedicated NPU
    • 13.8-inch or 15-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    • Integrated privacy screen on select models
    • All-day battery life
    Meet Surface Laptop
  • New

    Surface Laptop for Business, 13-inch | Intel

    Starting at $1,499.99

    Powerful AI productivity in a lightweight laptop with the latest Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3) performance.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3)
    • AI experiences powered by a dedicated NPU
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ touchscreen
    • All-day battery life
    Meet Surface Laptop

  • Surface Pro, 12-inch | Snapdragon

    Starting at $1,199.99

    The ultra-portable, powerful, and flexible 2-in-1 PC designed for lightning-fast performance and enhanced AI experiences.

    • Snapdragon® X Plus processor
    • Exceptional battery life
    • 12-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    Meet Surface Pro

  • Surface Laptop, 13-inch | Snapdragon

    Starting at $1,299.99

    Powerful, intelligent, and ultra-portable laptop designed for enhanced AI experiences and fast performance.

    • Snapdragon® X Plus processor
    • Exceptional battery life
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ touchscreen
    Meet Surface Laptop

  • Surface Pro, 13-inch (11th Ed.) | Intel

    Starting at $1,699.99

    The versatile 2-in-1 PC designed to boost productivity with exceptional performance and powerful AI capabilities.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 2)
    • AI-enhanced communication
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    • Long battery life
    Meet Surface Pro

  • Surface Laptop, 13.8 and 15-inch (7th Ed.) | Intel

    Starting at $1,699.99

    Built for business, with powerful AI capabilities, exceptional performance and long battery life.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 2)
    • Powerful NPU to drive PC experiences
    • 13.8-inch or 15-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    • Optional 5G connectivity on 13.8-inch
    Meet Surface Laptop

  • Surface Pro, 13-inch | Snapdragon

    Starting at $1,449.99

    The flexible 2-in-1 PC designed for enhanced AI experiences, with industry leading AI acceleration to unlock powerful new features.

    • Snapdragon® X Elite and Plus processors
    • Exceptional battery life
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    • Optional 5G connectivity
    Meet Surface Pro

  • Surface Laptop, 13.8 and 15-inch | Snapdragon

    Starting at $1,449.99

    Ultra-thin laptop designed for enhanced AI experiences, with industry leading AI acceleration to unlock powerful new features.

    • Snapdragon® X Elite and Plus processors
    • Exceptional battery life
    • 13.8-inch or 15-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    Meet Surface Laptop

  • Surface Studio 2+

    Starting at $4,499.99

    Find fuel for inspiration on a sleek, versatile all-in-one device that commands attention.

    • 28-inch touchscreen display
    • 11th Gen Intel® Core™ H-35 Processor
    • NVIDIA® GeForce RTX 3060 dGPU
    Meet Surface Studio 2+

  • Surface Hub 3

    An all-in-one digital whiteboard, meetings platform, and collaborative computing device.

    • 50-inch display for smaller spaces
    • 85-inch display for larger rooms

  • [1] Business Value White Paper, commissioned by Microsoft September 2022 | Doc. #US49453722 IDC Research Study conducted from surveys and interviews between December 2021 – February 2022. All respondents were IT decision-makers at large organizations (250-5000+ employees) representing organizations from the United States, Australia, India, Spain, France, United Kingdom, New Zealand, and Germany. Cost & Savings findings based on average cost and time estimates provided directly by respondents; actual costs and savings may vary based on your specific Device Mix and deployment. For the detailed study, click here.
  • [2] Create new value with laptops designed by Microsoft​. For the study, click here.
